evals.name: Google Maps URL → POI JSON
evals.description: Parse a Google Maps ?q= URL and return structured POI data via Places API.
assertions: Output is valid JSON with a single POI object (not an array)
POI has non-empty 'name' and 'name_local' fields
POI has 'lat' and 'lng' fields with numeric values
POI has 'category' field matching one of: food, culture, sightseeing, nature, shopping, nightlife, accommodation
POI has 'visit_duration_min' field with a positive integer
POI has 'opening_hours' field (may be empty string but key exists)
POI has 'google_maps_link' field with a URL string
POI has 'tags' array with 1-5 items
POI has 'description' or 'description_local' field
Exit code is 0 and JSON is on stdout (not stderr)

evals.name: Plain text query → POI JSON
evals.description: Search by place name and return structured POI data.
assertions: Output is valid JSON with a single POI object
POI 'category' is 'food' (restaurant type)
POI has 'visit_duration_min' between 30 and 90 (restaurant range)
POI has 'lat' and 'lng' with plausible Tokyo coordinates (lat 35.x, lng 139.x)
POI has 'tips' field containing rating info
POI has 'budget_jpy' and 'budget_twd' if price level is available
Exit code is 0

evals.name: Save to file with --save flag
evals.description: Verify --save writes the same JSON to the specified file path.
assertions: Exit code is 0
stdout contains valid POI JSON
File at --save path exists and contains identical JSON to stdout
POI 'category' is 'sightseeing' or 'culture'
POI 'visit_duration_min' is >= 90 (museum/attraction range)

evals.name: Non-Google URL (Tabelog) → POI JSON
evals.description: Parse a Tabelog URL by fetching the page title, then search Places API.
assertions: Exit code is 0 (or 1 if page fetch fails, with meaningful stderr)
If successful, output is valid POI JSON with 'category' = 'food'
POI has 'name' derived from the page title, not from URL path segments
POI has 'google_maps_link' field

evals.name: Missing API key → graceful error
evals.description: Running without API key should exit 1 with a clear error message.
assertions: Exit code is 1
stderr contains 'GOOGLE_MAPS_API_KEY' or 'api-key'
stdout is empty (no partial JSON output)

evals.name: Output compatible with Navigator --new-poi
evals.description: Verify the output JSON has all required fields for Navigator insert mode.
assertions: POI has 'name' field (required by Navigator)
POI has 'opening_hours' field (read by Navigator for scheduling)
POI has 'visit_duration_min' field (read by Navigator for time slot calculation)
POI does NOT have 'time_slot' field (Navigator assigns this)
POI does NOT have 'transit_from_prev_min' field (Navigator assigns this)
JSON is a single object, not wrapped in an array
